questions.question: What is the binary representation of the decimal number 13?
Which of the following is a prime number?
questions.explanation: 53 has no divisors other than 1 and itself. 21=3x7, 51=3x17, 63=7x9

questions.question: In the number 4,372, what is the value of digit 3?
questions.explanation: 3 is in the hundreds place = 3 x 100 = 300
